vulnerability.title: Install the pcsc-lite package
vulnerability.description: The pcsc-lite package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install pcsc-lite
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "pcsc-lite" ; then dnf install -y "pcsc-lite" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: The remediation consists of a straightforward package installation using dnf, which is a low‑risk operation that does not affect authentication, networking, or bootloader configuration. It follows the policy for safe package installs.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; minimal impact on system stability; no service lockout
